reviews.review_title: Not really a lot of fun
reviews.review_description: I really regret buying this game. It has a lot of potential but it's highly frustrating (time constraint and no help) so there is very little enjoyment. If I wanted to be stressed out with deadlines I would go to work.

developer_response.body: Hi Ale, sorry that you didn't like it. We are available in any social media to help you with the parts you got stuck. We are also thinking in releasing some sort of in-game helpers, would that be a good feature in you opinion? Please enter in contact with us so we can help you as good as we can ;).

reviews.review_description: Please upgrade products to be used with Quest 2. Thank you

developer_response.body: Hey DOC, we tried, but Oculus/Facebook doesn't want it on Quest :(.

reviews.review_description: Awesome escape the room game! I want more
Downloaded game got halfway thru and screen goes black . Can hear sounds but no visuals

developer_response.body: Hi there  Scott, can please elaborate that? The game have not finish the download? Have you tried the demo version? Which mobile phone do you have? Please send us an email or facebook so we can work together! Kind regards!

reviews.review_title: Worth to buy but need some fixes..
reviews.review_description:
Firstly, make the movements swiping forth and back instead of click the touchpad. 
Second, Remove back button and use back button of touchpad in inventory (I noticed too late that clicking twice goes back..)
Lastly.. There are very annoying bugs.. Fix them pls (stucks too much.. Can't pass through small things. Stops walking when looking around..) When I returned main menu while I'm big by food and started a new game, the game started by making me half sized bigger than normal and I couldn't move or interact anything.. So needed to exit the game and come back again. 
Not disappearing used items also confused me too much. I had two potions in my inventory..

developer_response.body:
Hi Ozan, how are you doing?
The swipe movements were giving some nausea on our tests, but we can try something like that. The back button was a problem with the guidelines of Oculus, they specifically asked us to not use the Back to open the menu. Some items do not disappear because you can use them multiple times (potions and cakes, but they do change how much you still have of them).

reviews.review_description: Simple but good graphics, sound is scaring and puzzles hard!

A bit too short for my taste, but not bad for a first game. I found a few bugs (running on Oculus Go) where I would fall through the floor and had to restart the game to continue.

I certainly played for more than 30 min. due to the aforementioned bug and lack of save game / restore point, otherwise would have taken about that.

developer_response.body: Hey King, thanks for the compliments. We have tried to test this bug and fixed before, so it should not happen again, but I will ask the team to try to get it again. Could you tell us how much time you spent on the game? Our tests show an average of 30+ minutes of gameplay, but this changes a lot from player to player. Cheers

reviews.review_description:
I always loved escape games and ever since I started to hear about VR I wondered how it would be to play a game like that with that much immersion. The Rabbit Hole delivers it. It's the best experience I've had on the Gear VR so far, the only one that made me not take off the visor for over 40 minutes of straight game play. 

Great game, congratulations to the team.

reviews.review_title: nice but scary complex puzzles possible
reviews.review_description: praise Jesus

developer_response.body: Happy that you have liked, the puzzles are indeed complex, we believe a game should have some challenges as well, if too hard let us know so we can make them easier...

reviews.review_description: This is an escape the room game with an amazing,  immersive and creepy ambiance and a very unique game play centered around changing your size and the scale of the world. Very challenging and fun,  highly recommended!
In a room look at stuff n move around

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review edrosen! Hope you like the next update!

reviews.review_description: Some puzzles are really hard
Hi I have re installed the game but still only one room  I have completed the room but the game ends there

developer_response.body: There is only one room with three different setups: day, night, and nightmare. If this is not what you're seeing, please contact us at contato@vrmonkey.com.br with your phone model and a description of your issue and we'll provide full support.

reviews.review_description: Loved the puzzles. The last room is VERY scary.

developer_response.body: Thanks man! Glad that you liked! Have you tried with motion controller?

reviews.review_description:
Tried to play but was too jittery couldn't move or touch anything without it constantly shaking.
Update...after starting the game.

developer_response.body: Hi there, not sure what you mean by jittery, it runs on fixed 60fps on a Galaxy S6. Please contact us on contato@vrmonkey.com.br so we can talk about you problem

reviews.review_description: This is a beautiful looking game and the premise is nice, but I spend most of my time clicking and nothing happens! The controls are very buggy. I'm able to interact with a few hot spots, but eventually the controls stop working and I'm just standing there clicking the controller unable to advance. Please fix this so I'll be able to actually play and enjoy this game! Samsung Galaxy S8+.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review, can you please talk to us thru Facebook or mail? We will try to reproduce your problem and fix it ASAP. First, are you using the motion controller or the touchpad? Thanks!

reviews.review_description: I am unable to do the door puzzle due to bugs in the game, so I can't finish the game. You can hear a clicking sound but the tiles on the puzzle do not move.  I have had to stop and restart many times. It's frustating to invest time in a game you can't complete due to lack of quality.

developer_response.body: Hi there, thanks for reaching out! We will try it here to see if we can reproduce this issue. In the mean time if you want to contact us on FB so we can try to help you or even release a faster fix, please do it.

reviews.review_description: One of the best games I played so far!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! Glad that you liked it!

reviews.review_description: Can't figure out what to do

developer_response.body: Please send us an email telling where you are stuck! We can give you tips!

reviews.review_description: I love puzzle and strategy games so this was perfect! I love that it's like Alice in Wonderland style game! I hope more like this are made.

developer_response.body: We are very glad that you liked the game! Thanks for an amazing review!
